title: Dragonseeker easy recipe
description: makes the dragonseeker mod recipe easier.
body:
makes the recipe for the dragonseeker Level 1 easier to get. [Dragonseeker mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragonseeker/files/5097405)

**It needs the Dragonseeker mod**

_this mod is not made that good_
